generic_rules: Focus repairs on resolving type mismatches reported by the AGREE validator.
Prioritize fixing unresolved identifiers or invalid helper declarations within AGREE expressions.
Ensure AGREE expressions use only visible AADL features or locally declared helpers.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts reside within `annex agree { ... };` blocks.
Use `eq` for definitions and `guarantee` for properties.
Ensure expressions on both sides of an equality (`=`) have the same type.
anti_patterns: Do not introduce new architecture to fix AGREE errors; focus on contract corrections.
Avoid using implementation-level details in component type contracts.
Do not attempt to use AGREE types other than `int`, `real`, and `bool`.
